stemHtml: During an IFR flight at an altitude of 3300 ft and a transition altitude at 3000 ft. Given that the current QNH is 991 hPa, the OAT at an aerodrome with an elevation of 179 ft is +8°C, the magnetic track is 182° and the variation is 4°W, what is the minimum flight level the aircraft can be flown at?
